query_normalized: the impact of text message tone on perceived emotional support psychology
rationale: The paper focuses on the specific domain of sexual consent and violence prevention on dating apps, which is a distinct construct from the user's question about the general impact of text message tone on perceived emotional support. While both involve computer-mediated communication, the paper does not measure the mechanism of "tone," the variable of "emotional support," or the psychological construct of "perceived support," failing to meet any of the inclusion criteria (a-f) and falling under th
